patch.value: pm list --tree: recursive subtree rendering with indented hierarchy
Navigating epic->feature->task hierarchy needs N round-trips today. --tree recursively expands descendants with indentation for one-shot work-breakdown views.
pm list --tree [--parent <id>] renders indented descendants (text+json); --tree-depth caps recursion; composes with --fields/--sort/--status; pm get <id> --tree shows the subtree.
Navigating epic->feature->task hierarchy needs N round-trips today. --tree recursively expands descendants with indentation for one-shot work-breakdown views.
